'''zajunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huckabuck|huckabuck]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huckabuck|huckabuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zajunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjinith|zæjinith]] || [[word:zæjinij|zæjinij]] || [[word:zæjinish|zæjinish]] || [[word:zæjini|zæjini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajujunuth|zajujunuth]] || [[word:zajujunuj|zajujunuj]] || [[word:zajujunush|zajujunush]] || [[word:zajujunu|zajujunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajunuth|zajunuth]] || [[word:zajunuj|zajunuj]] || [[word:zajunush|zajunush]] || [[word:zajunu|zajunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajufnuth|zajufnuth]] || [[word:zajufnuj|zajufnuj]] || [[word:zajufnush|zajufnush]] || [[word:zajufnuf|zajufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zajunuthu|zajunuthu]] || [[word:zajunuju|zajunuju]] || [[word:zajunushu|zajunushu]] || [[word:zajunuku|zajunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zajunuth|zajunuth]] || [[word:zajunuj|zajunuj]] || [[word:zajunush|zajunush]] || [[word:zajunu|zajunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zajunuthul|zajunuthul]] || [[word:zajunujul|zajunujul]] || [[word:zajunushul|zajunushul]] || [[word:zajunukul|zajunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zajunuthuthu|zajunuthuthu]] || [[word:zajunujuju|zajunujuju]] || [[word:zajunushushu|zajunushushu]] || [[word:zajunuku|zajunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zajunuthun|zajunuthun]] || [[word:zajunujun|zajunujun]] || [[word:zajunushun|zajunushun]] || [[word:zajunukun|zajunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zajunuthuoro|zajunuthuoro]] || [[word:zajunujuoro|zajunujuoro]] || [[word:zajunushuoro|zajunushuoro]] || [[word:zajunukuoro|zajunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
